description: Add 200-bar SMA regime filter (price above SMA = uptrend) as a single structural change to the entry gate — filters out countertrend trades in bear regimes without stacking additional momentum conditi
Add ATR-based take-profit exit: lock in gains when price reaches 2× ATR above entry, complementing the existing ATR trailing stop for more balanced exit timing.
Add RSI overbought exit as a fourth parallel exit rail (RSI > 65 triggers exit on overextended momentum), complementing the existing Donchian-break, ATR-trailing, and time-decay exits.

Shorten max_bars_in_trade from 40→30 bars (~5 days) to capture more trades in the validation window and reduce idle capital during post-breakout chop, where the strategy loses edge in mean-reverting c
